name: historiandownloader
description: An Electron application with React and TypeScript
author: example.com

scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:node && npm run typecheck:web
scripts.sidecar:build: cd python && python3 -m PyInstaller build/hd-sidecar.spec --noconfirm --distpath ../resources/hd-sidecar --workpath build-temp --clean
scripts.build:unpack: pnpm run sidecar:build && electron-vite build && electron-builder --dir
scripts.build:win: pnpm run sidecar:build && pnpm run typecheck && electron-vite build && electron-builder --win
scripts.build:mac: pnpm run sidecar:build && pnpm run typecheck && electron-vite build && electron-builder --mac
scripts.build:linux: pnpm run sidecar:build && pnpm run typecheck && electron-vite build && electron-builder --linux
